ns0:entry.ns0:title: Infrasys-AI/AIInfra
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Infrasys-AI/AIInfra
Language: jupyter-notebook
AIInfra（AI 基础设施）指AI系统从底层芯片等硬件，到上层软件栈支持AI大模型训练和推理。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Lordog/dive-into-llms
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Lordog/dive-into-llms
Language: jupyter-notebook
《动手学大模型Dive into LLMs》系列编程实践教程

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA-NeMo/Nemotron
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Nemotron
Language: jupyter-notebook
Developer Asset Hub for NVIDIA Nemotron — A one-stop resource for training recipes, usage cookbooks, datasets, and full end-to-end reference examples to build with Nemotron models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/cosmos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/cosmos
Language: jupyter-notebook
NVIDIA Cosmos is an open platform of world models, datasets, and tools that enables developers to build Physical AI for robots, autonomous vehicles, smart infrastructure, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Pierian-Data/Complete-Python-3-Bootcamp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Pierian-Data/Complete-Python-3-Bootcamp
Language: jupyter-notebook
Course Files for Complete Python 3 Bootcamp Course on Udemy

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QwenLM/Qwen3-VL
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen3-VL
Language: jupyter-notebook
Qwen3-VL is the multimodal large language model series developed by Qwen team, Alibaba Cloud.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SakanaAI/AI-Scientist
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SakanaAI/AI-Scientist
Language: jupyter-notebook
The AI Scientist: Towards Fully Automated Open-Ended Scientific Discovery 🧑‍🔬

ns0:entry.ns0:title: datawhalechina/happy-llm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datawhalechina/happy-llm
Language: jupyter-notebook
📚 从零开始构建大模型

ns0:entry.ns0:title: datawhalechina/self-llm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datawhalechina/self-llm
Language: jupyter-notebook
《开源大模型食用指南》针对中国宝宝量身打造的基于Linux环境快速微调（全参数/Lora）、部署国内外开源大模型（LLM）/多模态大模型（MLLM）教程

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ed-donner/llm_engineering
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ed-donner/llm_engineering
Language: jupyter-notebook
Repo to accompany my mastering LLM engineering course

ns0:entry.ns0:title: evidentlyai/evidently
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/evidentlyai/evidently
Language: jupyter-notebook
Evidently is ​​an open-source ML and LLM observability framework. Evaluate, test, and monitor any AI-powered system or data pipeline. From tabular data to Gen AI. 100+ metrics.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/dinov3
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/dinov3
Language: jupyter-notebook
Reference PyTorch implementation and models for DINOv3

ns0:entry.ns0:title: meta-llama/llama-cookbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/meta-llama/llama-cookbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
Welcome to the Llama Cookbook! This is your go to guide for Building with Llama: Getting started with Inference, Fine-Tuning, RAG. We also show you how to solve end to end problems using Llama model family and using them on various provider services

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mcp-for-beginners
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mcp-for-beginners
Language: jupyter-notebook
This open-source curriculum introduces the fundamentals of Model Context Protocol (MCP) through real-world, cross-language examples in .NET, Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, Rust and Python. Designed for developers, it focuses on practical techniques for building modular, scalable, and secure AI workflows from session setup to service orchestration.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pyannote/pyannote-audio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pyannote/pyannote-audio
Language: jupyter-notebook
Neural building blocks for speaker diarization: speech activity detection, speaker change detection, overlapped speech detection, speaker embedding

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rlabbe/Kalman-and-Bayesian-Filters-in-Python
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rlabbe/Kalman-and-Bayesian-Filters-in-Python
Language: jupyter-notebook
Kalman Filter book using Jupyter Notebook. Focuses on building intuition and experience, not formal proofs. Includes Kalman filters,extended Kalman filters, unscented Kalman filters, particle filters, and more. All exercises include solutions.
